title: Interactive Bubble Animation with D3.js
Interactive Bubble Animation with D3.js
Interactive Bubble Animation with D3.js
text:
How It Works
This interactive visualization uses:

D3.js Force Simulation: Physics-based layout with collision detection
Observable JS: Reactive programming in Quarto
Smooth Transitions: Elastic and polynomial easing functions
Interactive Elements: Click to zoom, drag to move, click outside to reset


Key Features

Entry Animation: Bubbles pop in with elastic bounce effect
Physics Simulation: Continuous floating motion with collision avoidance
Click Interaction: Zoom to center and display details
Drag Support: Move bubbles around manually
Reset: Click background to return to normal state



Customization
Replace the data array with your own content. Each object needs:

id: Unique identifier
name: Display name
category: Category label
value: Size value (larger = bigger bubble)
icon: Emoji or text icon
desc: Description text
